location: On a ledge on the coastline bordering Limgrave and Caelid, east of the Third Church of Marika. Reached by clearing Gaol Cave (entrance in Caelid, needs 2 Stonesword Keys) and exiting onto the cliffside, or by using Torrent to double-jump directly up the cliff face from the beach.

source.name: Ledge above the coastline at the Gaol Cave exit

tactics: Standard route: clear Gaol Cave (2 Stonesword Keys needed to open the sealed entrance) and defeat its boss to reach the cliff exit where the sword sits.
Shortcut: from the Third Church of Marika, ride Torrent along the red-hued cliffside and chain double-jumps to scale it directly, skipping the dungeon.
Gaol Cave is one of the more key-expensive dungeons in the game — don't confuse it with cheaper nearby caves.
lore: The treasured sword of Eochaid, a minor and long-vanished kingdom — its copper sheen isn't rust but a conduit letting its wielder move the blade by will alone, making it dance through the air in combat.

builds.name: Arcane poke/bleed
builds.why: D Dexterity / D Arcane scaling on both its physical and magic damage make it a solid Arcane build weapon, especially paired with attack-boosting talismans that trigger on its multi-hit Dancing Blade skill.
